response.justification: Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and an entrepreneurial background, meeting the minimum baseline requirements. However, he lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise, advanced AI education, and Director-level strategic advisory experience expected for a Principal AI Strategy role, as his AI exposure appears limited to his most recent position.
strengths: Over 15 years of comprehensive software, infrastructure, and full-stack engineering experience.
Strong entrepreneurial background as the founder of the open-source platform GISCollective.
Demonstrated technical community leadership through open-source contributions, workshops, and public speaking.
concerns: Lacks recognized, long-term expertise and deep strategic experience in Artificial Intelligence.
Does not hold a preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
Past roles align more with hands-on Staff/Senior development rather than Director-level strategic advisory.
